meta.project: Sistem Informasi Administrasi Surat Desa Ujungbatu III

product_overview: Web application to help desa staff search resident data, generate standardized village letters (surat) as PDFs, and maintain an archive of issued letters. Operators authenticate, pick a letter template, auto-fill resident data, preview, generate, and store letters for retrieval.
core_goals: Allow desa staff to authenticate and access the admin dashboard
Search and browse resident (penduduk) records and import bulk data from spreadsheets
Create standardized surat by selecting a template and auto-filling resident data
Preview, generate, download/print PDF letters, and store every issued surat in an archive
Provide a browsable archive with search by name, date range, and letter type

features.name: Admin login
features.description: Sign in with username and password to access the admin area and management features.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit the form to sign in -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard overview cards
Navigate to /login -> Enter incorrect username or password -> Submit the form to sign in -> See error message about invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard overview
features.description: After authentication, view summary statistics for residents and letters to get a quick operational snapshot.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit the form to sign in -> Redirect to /dashboard -> Read total penduduk, total surat, and surat hari ini cards
Navigate to /dashboard (when already authenticated) -> Read total penduduk, total surat, and surat hari ini cards

features.name: Penduduk management
features.description: Browse resident records in a table and import resident data from Excel/CSV to populate the database.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/penduduk -> See the penduduk table and current records -> Start the import flow -> Upload a spreadsheet file (Excel/CSV) -> Map or confirm import fields if prompted -> Complete the import -> See imported records appear in the penduduk table

Navigate to /dashboard/penduduk -> Start the import flow -> Upload a file in an unsupported format or with invalid columns -> Submit import -> See validation error explaining the required file format/columns

features.name: Create surat
features.description: Select a surat type, select or search for a resident to auto-fill template variables, complete any extra fields, preview, and generate a PDF ready for download/print; the surat is stored in the archive.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/surat/buat -> Choose letter type from available templates -> Search for penduduk by name or NIK -> See penduduk data populate the form -> Fill additional required fields (e.g., keperluan) -> Preview the surat -> Generate PDF -> Download or print the PDF -> Confirm surat saved to archive

Navigate to /dashboard/surat/buat -> Choose letter type -> Search for penduduk or enter data manually -> Submit form with missing required fields -> See validation errors indicating which fields are required

features.name: Surat archive
features.description: Browse and search the archive of issued letters and download stored PDFs for reuse or printing.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/surat/arsip -> Input search criteria (name, date range, or letter type) -> See list of matching surat in the archive -> Open a surat detail -> Download the stored PDF
Navigate to /dashboard/surat/arsip -> Leave search empty to view recent items -> Browse the list of archived surat

routes.description: Admin login page with credentials form
Dashboard with counts for penduduk and surat

features.name: Admin login
features.description: Sign in with username and password using NextAuth credentials provider
user_interactions: Enter username in the username field
Enter password in the password field
Submit the form to sign in
See error message when credentials are invalid
Redirect to dashboard after successful login

features.name: Dashboard overview
features.description: View summary statistics for residents and letters from the database
user_interactions: Read total penduduk, total surat, and surat hari ini cards

features.name: Penduduk management
user_interactions: Use import flow to upload spreadsheet data

features.name: Create surat
features.description: Fill form to generate a new village letter
user_interactions: Select letter type and fill required fields
Submit to create or preview document flow as implemented

features.name: Surat archive
features.description: View list of archived or issued letters
user_interactions: Open archive page and browse surat list

known_limitations.issue: Root path still shows default create-next-app marketing content rather than app-specific landing
known_limitations.impact: Users may expect desa branding on home; consider redirect to login or dashboard

known_limitations.issue: ESLint reports no-explicit-any and react/no-unescaped-entities in several dashboard files
known_limitations.impact: Code quality and CI lint may fail until resolved
